text: Record at most one Canonical Transaction for one economic event without losing financial precision or provider-neutral evidence lineage. Evidence: direct — the owner requires notification-derived transactions to be confirmed by later statements without duplicates; workflows UC-LEDGER-002, UC-LEDGER-009, UC-LEDGER-013, UC-LEDGER-014, and UC-LEDGER-015.
target: Every accepted transaction round-trips exact account, amount, currency, date, description, lifecycle, and stable identity; it may link multiple idempotently registered Evidence Record and append-only Reconciliation Decision while erroneous facts or links are corrected attributably rather than overwritten.
